ignorePatterns:
.venv/**
dist/**
build/**
**/__pycache__/**
**/*.egg-info/**
site/**
out/**
tmp/**
scratch/**
**/node_modules/**
uv.lock
pixi.lock
**/*.lock
instructions: Python project. Skip style/formatting nits (handled by ruff). Focus on correctness, security, and maintainability.

rules.rule: Avoid bare `except:` and overly broad `except Exception:`. Catch specific exception types.
Configuration display, logs, and error messages must redact keys, tokens, and credentials.
Prefer pathlib.Path over os.path string manipulation in new code.
Public functions and methods should have type annotations on parameters and return values.
